assumptions: Activity ID filters are expected to use file-, folder-, share-, request-, and token- prefixes.
Existing activity pagination, authentication, cache restoration, and timeline rendering remain unchanged.
The CodePen reference provides the Neuromorphic visual language but should not introduce external runtime dependencies.
risks: The working tree already contains unrelated user changes.
NeuDatePicker is shared and must preserve portal and viewport behavior.
Invalid-filter guarding must not block valid empty filters or prefixed IDs.
All visible sizing must remain fluid and avoid fixed visual dimensions.
dependencies: React/Vite frontend tests and build scripts
steps: Implement filter validation and request guarding
